title: Moderation update: spam & harassment actions
body:
Hi all,

Our moderation team has reviewed several recent high-severity reports:

- A spam/phishing incident involving mass link posting across multiple channels resulted in an immediate ban for the account involved.
- Repeated targeted harassment of newcomers led to a formal warning. Further incidents from that account will result in stricter action.
- A mass report against a core maintainer was investigated and confirmed to be a false-positive driven by brigading; no action has been taken against the maintainer.

We appreciate everyone who reports issues in good faith. Please continue to use the report tools when you see spam, harassment, or other violations. If you have concerns about a moderation decision, you can reach out via the usual appeal channels.

Thank you for helping us keep this community safe and welcoming.
